scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names api,web --prefix-colors green,cyan "npm run dev -w @cloudflare-man/server" "npm run dev -w @cloudflare-man/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cloudflare-man/server && npm run build -w @cloudflare-man/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @cloudflare-man/server && npm run typecheck -w @cloudflare-man/web
